attributes.accessibilityText: Notification permission required DoneYet? needs local notification permission to remind you about tasks. If you allow it, recurring reminders become active. Enable permission Done yet? Keeps tasks active and keeps asking until they are completed. Quick add Choose the task behavior first, then decide which list it belongs to. Write a new task  Reminder With reminders Reminders are scheduled and will nudge you again.  To-Do No reminders To-Do tasks stay simple and do not send notifications. List selection Which list should this task belong to? Focus Home Health You can long-press and drag lists to reorder them on the home screen. Continue Active Today Overdue Active tasks Tasks that are currently open. Tap a card to view details.  Snooze  Done Follow up on the quarterly review  Snooze  Done Water the plants  Snooze  Done Wrap up the product polish list  Snooze  Done Go to the evening workout  Snooze  Done Prep lunch for tomorrow  Snooze  Done Pay rent  Snooze  Done Plan next week priorities  Done Buy fresh fruit Lists Add list You can long-press and drag lists to reorder them on the home screen. Focus Home Health Vertical scroll bar, 1 page Horizontal scroll bar, 1 page Today's reminders All No tasks today There are no reminders scheduled for today. Overdue Track No overdue tasks Pending tasks are on track. Vertical scroll bar, 5 pages Horizontal scroll bar, 1 page Home Home, tab, 1 of 6 Today, tab, 2 of 6 Calendar, tab, 3 of 6 Upcoming, tab, 4 of 6 Completed, tab, 5 of 6 Settings, tab, 6 of 6

error.debugMessage:
Assertion 'id: list-detail-screen is visible' failed. Check the UI hierarchy in debug artifacts to verify the element state and properties.

Possible causes:
- Element selector may be incorrect - check if there are similar elements with slightly different names/properties.
- Element may be temporarily unavailable due to loading state
- This could be a real regression that needs to be addressed
error.localizedMessage: Assertion is false: id: list-detail-screen is visible
